title: viola tricolor var. sudetica
intro: Viola tricolor var. sudetica, also known as the heartsease, is a perennial plant in the viola family that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viola tricolor var. sudetica include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Viola tricolor var. sudetica include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make topical creams and ointments for skin issues, as well as a natural remedy for digestive problems.
